label: Spel- och vadhållningsverksamhet
description: Branschspecifik scaffold för spel- och vadhållningsverksamhet med fokus på tydligt erbjudande, ansvarsfull information, praktiska besöksuppgifter och kontakt.
primaryJobs: leda besökaren till kontakt eller besök på plats

routes.purpose: Positionera verksamheten, förklara erbjudandet på en tydlig nivå och leda vidare till kontakt eller besök.
Visa vilka spel, vadhållningsformer eller aktiviteter som erbjuds och hur besökaren tar nästa steg.
Ge praktisk information om plats, öppettider och hur ett besök går till.
Göra det enkelt att kontakta verksamheten via formulär, telefon, e-post eller hitta rätt adress.

routes.when: when the business has a clear story, team presentation or ownership information that strengthens trust
when the business needs to answer common questions about rules, åldersgränser, öppettider or practical details

sectionOrderRules: Hero must state the business type and the primary next step such as contact or visit.
Offering summary must describe the main game, betting or entertainment offering in concrete terms without promising outcomes.
Trust proof must rely on real business facts such as organisation details, references, location or established routines, not invented claims.
Visit summary may appear before the final CTA when opening hours or location are important for conversion.
Sections must not encourage irresponsible play or make unrealistic value claims.
Games intro must explain the offered categories clearly and in plain language.
Game list items must be specific, for example game types, betting formats or on-site activities, not vague marketing labels.
Practical info must clarify how participation works at a high level, including any relevant age or entry conditions when supplied by the dossier.
Pricing overview is only shown when the business has clear price, fee or participation information to present honestly.
Opening hours and location info must be visible before the final CTA.
Location info must include real address or area details when available, never placeholders.
Map should only render when valid location data exists.
Venue gallery should show the actual environment and help visitors understand what to expect on site.
Contact info must contain the real channels provided by the business, such as phone, e-mail and address when available.
Contact form must offer a simple path to questions or visit enquiries.
Opening hours and map may be repeated here when they help conversion, but copy should stay concise and not duplicate entire sections from the visit page.

mustPass: Has a dedicated route for the actual industry offering, not only generic services.
Makes practical visit information easy to find because location and opening hours are often important in this industry.
Uses honest, factual wording and avoids promises about winnings, outcomes or guarantees.
Includes clear contact paths and supports the category capability contact-form.
Supports trust-building through real business information, team, reviews or FAQs when available.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic service-business structure that ignores games, betting or visitor experience.
Invented licences, certifications, player counts or win claims.
Overuse of promotional language that obscures what the business actually offers.
Duplicate sections across pages with the same message and no new information.
CTAs that pressure users with unrealistic urgency or outcome-based promises.

compatibleDossiers.comment: Kandidat-rekommendationer härledda ur branschprofilen; verifiera mot riktiga Dossier-id före promotion.

selectionProfile.embeddingText: Spel- och vadhållningsverksamhet scaffold för småföretagswebb med startsida, spel- och utbudssida, besökssida och kontaktsida. Fokuserar på konkret erbjudande, praktisk besöksinformation, öppettider, karta, kontaktformulär, förtroende och ansvarsfull tonalitet utan orealistiska löften.
llmClassificationHints: Choose this scaffold when the business primarily offers betting, gaming or on-site play activities and visitors need to understand the offering plus how to visit or contact the venue.
Prefer this over a generic local service scaffold when the core content is game formats, betting options, venue experience or visitor rules rather than traditional services.
A strong match includes need for opening hours, map, practical visit details and an offer page tailored to games or betting categories.

variants.label: Draft Default
variants.description: Startvariant kopierad från referens-scaffoldens default så kandidaten kan förhandsgranskas; ersätts vid kurering.
